allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS gym_powersurge;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, photo FROM trainers; SELECT title, category, image_path FROM gallery;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, price, duration_days FROM membership_packages ORDER BY sort_order; SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM settings;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT id, name, slug, photo FROM trainers;")

Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, monthly_pt_price, availability_status FROM trainers; SELECT trainer_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, is_off FROM trainer_schedule ORDER BY trainer_id, day_of_week;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -N -e "SELECT id FROM trainers WHERE slug='rakibul-hasan';")

Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS sale_items FROM sale_items; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS purchase_items FROM purchase_items; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS product_images FROM product_images;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, brand, image FROM products WHERE image IS NOT NULL;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) trainers FROM trainers; SELECT COUNT\(*\) products FROM products;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT title, category, image_path FROM gallery WHERE category='team';")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, job_title, display_order, is_featured, availability_status FROM trainers;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT id, name, photo FROM trainers WHERE name='Test QA Trainer';")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT trainer_id, member_id, rating, comment FROM trainer_reviews;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT id, name, price, discount_price FROM membership_packages;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT id, name, regular_price, offer_price FROM membership_packages;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT p.name, p.badge, p.is_featured, f.feature_text FROM membership_packages p JOIN membership_package_features f ON f.package_id=p.id;")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT name, regular_price, offer_price, discount_amount, discount_percentage, badge FROM membership_packages WHERE name='QA Offer Package';")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT f.feature_text FROM membership_package_features f JOIN membership_packages p ON p.id=f.package_id WHERE p.name='QA Offer Package';")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -N -e "SELECT id FROM membership_packages WHERE name='QA Offer Package';")
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e 'UPDATE membership_packages SET offer_end_date='\\''2020-01-01 00:00:00'\\'' WHERE id=__CMDSUB_OUTPUT__;')
Bash(mysql -u root gym_powersurge -e "SELECT id, question, category FROM faqs ORDER BY sort_order;")
